qa_pairs.question: What command is used to list all available software modules on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all available software modules that can be loaded on the Trillium cluster, use the `module avail` command.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user load a specific version of a software package using the environment modules system on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: A user can load a specific version of a software package on Trillium by using the command `module load <module-name>/<module-version>`.

qa_pairs.question: How does one check which software modules are currently loaded in their environment on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: To show the software modules currently loaded in your environment on Trillium, use the `module list` command.
